FLOW.COMMENT: addFxEnvelope - wrap content8 in an fxEnvelope and save as content9

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: aliasSwitch - change the current receiver alias from the sender side to the receiver side
This logic follows the 5 steps diagrammed in the documentation:
Step 1: Get the Receiver alias on left
Step 2: Using the left alias, determine the TP_IID
Step 3: Get the App on the right from the workflow definition
Step 4: Look up the new alias using the TP_IID and the App on the right
Step 5: Update the Receiver alias on right if it has changed

INVOKE.COMMENT: Info: Sending side Receiver alias '%sReceiverAliasOnLeft% is the same as the Receiving side Receiver alias '%sReceiverAliasOnRight%'

Values.value: Info: Sending side Receiver alias '%sReceiverAliasOnLeft% is the same as the Receiving side Receiver alias '%sReceiverAliasOnRight%'

INVOKE.COMMENT: Receiver alias has been changed from '%sReceiverAliasOnLeft%' to '%sReceiverAliasOnRight%'

Values.value: Receiver alias has been changed from '%sReceiverAliasOnLeft%' to '%sReceiverAliasOnRight%'
